citations.desc: Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).
citations.narrative:
The semi-annual reports to the Institutional Official (IO) dated 9/26/25 and 4/16/26 were reviewed. Both reports stated that
there were no departures to the Animal Welfare Act during the reporting periods covered by each of these IO Reports.
However, IACUC approved protocol #25008 contains an IACUC approved departure from the provisions of the AWA
under Subpart F Other Species; Facilities, Indoor - Lighting.
Per this Section, the reports prepared by the IACUC following their semi-annual reviews of the animal facilities and the
program for animal use must contain a description of the nature and extent of the research facility’s adherence to this
subchapter, must identify specifically any departures from the provisions of title 9, chapter I, subchapter A – Animal
Welfare, and must state the reasons for each departure. The requirement that IACUC approved departures to the AWA
be included in the Semi-annual Report to the IO ensures that the Institutional Official, who is authorized to legally commit
on behalf of the institution that all of the requirements of the AWA 9 CFR will be met, is kept informed about the
departures as part of their regulatory oversight of the research activities at the institution.
Correct by revising and re-submitting the 4/16/26 Semi-annual Report to the IO to include the required information
regarding the departure to the AWA by 7/15/26 and all IACUC approved departures to the AWA must be included on all
future semi-annual reports to the IO.
This inspection and exit briefing were conducted with facility representative.
*END OF REPORT*
n

narrative:
2.31(c)(3) 
   
Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC). 
The semi-annual reports to the Institutional Official (IO) dated 9/26/25 and 4/16/26 were reviewed. Both reports stated that 
there were no departures to the Animal Welfare Act during the reporting periods covered by each of these IO Reports. 
However, IACUC approved protocol #25008 contains an IACUC approved departure from the provisions of the AWA 
under Subpart F Other Species; Facilities, Indoor - Lighting. 
 
Per this Section, the reports prepared by the IACUC following their semi-annual reviews of the animal facilities and the 
program for animal use must contain a description of the nature and extent of the research facility’s adherence to this 
subchapter, must identify specifically any departures from the provisions of title 9, chapter I, subchapter A – Animal 
Welfare, and must state the reasons for each departure. The requirement that IACUC approved departures to the AWA 
be included in the Semi-annual Report to the IO ensures that the Institutional Official, who is authorized to legally commit 
on behalf of the institution that all of the requirements of the AWA 9 CFR will be met, is kept informed about the 
departures as part of their regulatory oversight of the research activities at the institution. 
 
Correct by revising and re-submitting the 4/16/26 Semi-annual Report to the IO to include the required information 
regarding the departure to the AWA by 7/15/26 and all IACUC approved departures to the AWA must be included on all 
future semi-annual reports to the IO. 
 
This inspection and exit briefing were conducted with facility representative.  
 
*END OF REPORT*
